beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_ar: باريس سان جيرمان ضد ليفربول - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الذهاب
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_en: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.
